name: subagent-followup

defaults.continuity_policy: If mode is degraded-new-branch, explicitly state what context continuity was lost and what was reconstructed from the checkpoint.
defaults.output_format: Markdown sections: Continuation Mode, Applied Reply, Lost Context, Continued Work, Next Actions.

template: pi -p --model {model} --thinking {thinking} {tool_args} Continue from checkpoint using mode {mode}. Checkpoint: {checkpoint}. Coordinator reply: {reply}. Continuity policy: {continuity_policy}. Output format: {output_format}
